W0401.description: Variable declared as mutable '#' but never modified. Making it immutable reduces developer cognitive load and enables backend optimizations.

W0402.description: Variable is declared but never read. Dead variables should be cleaned to reduce code rot.

W0403.description: Module import or imported symbol is declared but never used. Redundant imports pollute the dependency DAG graph.

W0406.description: Discarded Result type. Errors should be explicitly handled or bound to '_' to signify intentional ignore.

S0401.description: Unreachable code detected after an unconditional return/diverging block.

S0402.description: Potential non-progress loop condition. The loop condition variable is never mutated inside the loop body, which might cause an infinite loop unless handled concurrently or via FFI.

W0701.description: Backend type is unresolved during codegen. Defaulting to i32 fallback.
